{
  "claims": [
    "California's Armed Prohibited Persons System (APPS) should be used by local law enforcement agencies to prevent unfit individuals from possessing firearms.",
    "There have been reports of little to no communication between the California Department of Justice (DOJ) and local law enforcement officials regarding the APPS database.",
    "Over 150 agencies reported they never received investigative reports or notes from the DOJ about individuals on the APPS database.",
    "The DOJ has reported a backlog of over 24,000 people in the APPS system.",
    "Sharing information and investigative reports with all law enforcement agencies will make Californians safer."
  ]
}
